key.name: position
key.description: Location of the Hijri-date button in the top bar.

key.name: center-position
key.summary: Position within the center panel box
key.description: Ordering of the Hijri-date button relative to other center indicators.

key.name: spacing
key.description: Number of blank pixels inserted after the indicator.

key.name: week-language
key.description: Language used for weekday labels in the calendar grid.

key.name: number-language
key.description: Numbering system for day and year values.

key.name: calendar-method
key.description: Calendar calculation used for Hijri month boundaries.

key.name: show-year
key.description: Toggle to include or hide the year component.

key.name: year-suffix-style
key.description: Literal appended after the year whenever it is shown.

key.name: date-format
key.description: A template that can contain any combination of the tokens {day}, {month}, {year} and {suffix}. They will be replaced at run-time. {suffix} appears only when "Show Year" is enabled.

key.name: date-offset
key.description: Number of days to shift the displayed Hijri date.

key.name: text-color
key.description: Color of the Hijri date text in the panel

key.name: use-theme-text-color
key.description: Use the GNOME Shell theme color for the Hijri date text in the panel.

key.name: calendar-text-color
key.description: Color of the Hijri calendar text in the popup.

key.name: use-theme-calendar-text-color
key.description: Use the GNOME Shell theme color for the Hijri calendar text in the popup.
